ddt:Target.Name: DCU17PC42_V2C0_V7
ddt:Target.Description:
Motorisation : R9MGen2, M9TGen4 -------------------------------------------------------- Init. Author : O. Gontier RBFR Update Author : F. Benoit RBFR -------------------------------------------------------- 02/2013 : Creation of DDT Base. 06/2013 : DTC Update 10/2013 : "Status" of the 0304 removed Creation of a status request for each Test Routine 14/11/2013 : Screens updated and non activation conditions implemented in Status request (goo1so) 27/01/2014 : Update After "ECU Check" operation - O. Gontier. DIDs 0x0327, 0x165F, 0x1676, 0x1693, 0x1714 have been removed du to the fact that DDT don't support 32 bits CAN Variables. New "System" screen in development. 26/02/2014: SCRETC FirstFilling answer updated. 09/04/2014: Creation of a Screen allowing to check the SCR System state. 10/10/2014: In case of complete tank changing, if the urea level refilled is not the same, it's possible to read the correct value witout delay 24/10/2014:bef2so: - Update of the DTCs and FTBs according to DIAG_DCU_Synthesis_B0RC.xlsx, - Creation of the screens "Post-repair operations", - Update of the screen "Sensors" according to "Ecran DDT SCR2.xlsx" (from S. Bouquiaux), - Creation of a screen for the routine "Dosing Valve Dry Actuation" (0x0309), - "Transporting flag" renamed "Manufacturing Mode". - $30 has been removed (not UDS compliant). 02/02/2015: bef2so: Version v290_v3: - Correction of the "Post-repair operations" screens for consistency with the DED/DFS. - Creation of the DTC $2BA9, - Removal of the PT1/PT2 differences in the Aftersale services First Filling and EOL. Not necessary in PP.
16/02/2015: bef2so: Version v2A0_v1: - Addition of the SW 7900 (in complement of 1166). - Correction of the response to the SCRETC requests. - DID change in the screen "Tank", renamed "Tank /Pressure Line/Supply Pump" - Init value of SCR Longterm Adaptation factor DID$0310 changed from 0097h to 0064h. - Screen "Tank or ....." renamed "Tank change". - Data "Active / No active" inverted. - In the screens "Aftersale_Routine", addition of the bits 11, 13, 14 and 15 for root causing the aborted tests.
07/08/2015: bef2so: Version v2C0_v1: - Addition of the FTB $29 in the DTC $24AF.
28/08/2015: bef2so: Version v2C0_v2: - Correction of the conversion of formula of DID 176D (SCRFBC_facNOXCtl)
04/09/2015: bef2so: Version v2C0_v3: - Correction of the Auto-Identification for the SW V2C0 (Logiciel = 7900 instad of 1166)
28/10/2015: bef2so: Version v2C0_v4: - Creation of the screens "DCU change" and "DOC-DPF change", - Change of UDM Id from $D1 to $D2.
09/02/2016 : bef2so: Version v2C0_v5t: - Addition of DIDs $220409 and $22040A - Addition of the data OutputControl, OutputPermanentControlList and OutputControlCommand. - Correction of AutoIdentification for correct length.
18/02/2016 : bef2so: Version v2C0_v6: - Correction of AutoIdentification for correct length. - DID $032A names corrected.

Label.Text: No fault disturb the SCR System
Release conditions from heating strategy are OK
Main States of the Bosch SCR System
Heating mode of dosing valve finished
In case of normal system behavior, KeyOff is done, system should switch to Pressure Reduction, Purge, then After Run
In case of normal system behavior, KeyOn is done, system should switch to Standby, NoPressure, then Pressure Control. The SCR system is able to dose
